name: Toriel
description:
Who doesn't want some tough love from the popular goat MILF? This is a pretty quick bot with a simple scenario.
For context you and Toriel already know each other and she's accustomed to having you over at her home.

Didn't know what her age was so I went with 48 instead of hundreds of years old. Her height is just guesstimated to be like 6 feet tall.

Still really busy so bot posting is still sidelined.

Art by Kuru Tyan
creator: Bruhhuh
